ddls:
CREATE TABLE "accounting_periods" (
  "accounting_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accounting period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the accounting period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the accounting period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the accounting period */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the accounting period (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year of the accounting period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accounting_period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of the campaign (e.g., Email, Social Media) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., Planned, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the campaign */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the campaign was created */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Channel used for the campaign (e.g., Email, Social Media, Influencer) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign (e.g., Demographics, Interests) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., Open Rate, Conversion Rate) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date the performance metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_status" (
  "company_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the company status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the company status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coupon_codes" (
  "coupon_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coupon code */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code of the coupon */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., Percentage, Fixed Amount) */,
  "discount_value" REAL /* Value of the discount */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Date the coupon becomes valid */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* Date the coupon expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the coupon (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "usage_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of times the coupon can be used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coupon_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate of the currency relative to a base currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opportunities" (
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opportunity */,
  "opportunity_name" TEXT /* Name of the opportunity */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account associated with the opportunity */,
  "lead_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead source (campaign) associated with the opportunity */,
  "company_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company status associated with the opportunity */,
  "promotion_code_instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotion code instance associated with the opportunity */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency associated with the opportunity */,
  "accounting_period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accounting period associated with the opportunity */,
  "amount" REAL /* Estimated amount of the opportunity */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Current stage of the opportunity (e.g., Prospecting, Qualification, Proposal) */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability of closing the opportunity */,
  "expected_close_date" TEXT /* Expected date of closing the opportunity */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the opportunity */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the opportunity was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the opportunity */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the opportunity was last modified */,
  "close_date" TEXT /* Date the opportunity was closed */,
  "close_reason" TEXT /* Reason for closing the opportunity (e.g., Won, Lost, Canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opportunity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opportunities_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opportunities_company_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_status_id") REFERENCES company_status ("company_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opportunities_lead_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_source_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opportunities_accounting_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("accounting_period_id") REFERENCES accounting_periods ("accounting_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opportunities_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opportunities_promotion_code_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_code_instance_id") REFERENCES promotion_code_instances ("promotion_code_instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opportunities_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the account (e.g., Customer, Partner) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the account */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the account */,
  "employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the account */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the primary contact */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the account was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the account */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the account was last modified */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the account */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the account */,
  "state" TEXT /* State/Province of the account */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the account */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Postal code of the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Sales Rep, Marketing Manager, Admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opportunity_stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stage */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the stage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stage */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability of closing the opportunity at this stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opportunity_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opportunity */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., Stage, Amount, Probability) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the changed field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opportunity_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opportunity_history_opportunity_id FOREIGN KEY ("opportunity_id") REFERENCES opportunities ("opportunity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., Percentage, Fixed Amount) */,
  "discount_value" REAL /* Value of the discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotion_code_instances" (
  "promotion_code_instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion code instance */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotion associated with the code instance */,
  "coupon_code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coupon code associated with the code instance */,
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opportunity associated with the code instance */,
  "used_date" TEXT /* Date the promotion code was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_code_instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotion_code_instances_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotion_code_instances_coupon_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("coupon_code_id") REFERENCES coupon_codes ("coupon_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotion_code_instances_opportunity_id FOREIGN KEY ("opportunity_id") REFERENCES opportunities ("opportunity_id")
)
